temporal_description:
A close-up shot focuses on the face of a man with a somber and intense expression. He has short, dark hair and is looking slightly downward. The lighting is dim and has a cool, blueish-green hue, casting soft shadows on his face. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The camera is static, holding a tight focus on his emotional state. The audio is dominated by a high-pitched, insistent electronic beeping, similar to a digital alarm or a notification sound. The sound is sharp and continuous, creating a tense and urgent atmosphere, as if signaling an important or critical moment. There is no dialogue or background music, making the electronic beep the sole focus of the soundscape.

The camera pulls back to a wider shot, revealing a dimly lit, formal room. The man from the previous shot is now seen sitting at a large, dark table, facing two other men who are seated with their backs to the camera. Across the table, a man in a light-colored suit and glasses sits at the head of the table, looking down. In the background, two other men in casual attire stand and observe the scene. The overall atmosphere is serious and tense, with the cool, moody lighting continuing to dominate the space. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner.

The camera zooms in slightly, focusing on the man in the suit. He looks up from the table, his expression serious. He reaches for a small, dark object on the table in front of him. The two men in the background begin to walk away from the table and out of the frame. The shot tightens further on the man in the suit as he picks up the object, which appears to be a small, dark, rectangular device. He examines it closely, turning it over in his hands. The man in the background continues to walk away into the darkness of the room. The "风行网" watermark is still present in the top right corner.
